The '''T-23 skyhopper''' was a high-performance [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]]. It was a successor to [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom's]] [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]].

==Characteristics==
Like the T-16, the T-23 had a tri-wing design and controls similar to those of the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. The T-23 could comfortably accommodate three passengers in the cockpit. It also contained a cramped cargo compartment toward the rear of the cockpit.

==History==
The T-23 was considered to be an older model by [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]].

Before he left his nephew [[Lowbacca]] at [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] gave Lowbacca a partially completed T-23 as a gift. During his stay, the young [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] used it to explore the jungle moon and entertain his new friends.

While the first time it was being repaired by Lowie and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], Skywalker was fondly reminded of his own [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]] back on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], chasing down [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rats]] in [[Beggar's Canyon/Legends|Beggar's Canyon]]. This amazed Jaina and her brother [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], who couldn't imagine Luke as a hotshot daredevil pilot. They and Lowie were even more astonished when he asked if after the repairs where done, they could give him a ride sometime.
